site.description: Healthcare technology company building intelligent software and products — from enterprise programs to clinical tools like Clinic.

meta.homeDescription: Realitas Infinitas builds intelligent software for complex operational environments — structure, clarity, and scalability for healthcare and beyond.
meta.aboutDescription: Realitas Infinitas is a product-oriented software company focused on precision, usability, and maintainability.
meta.contactDescription: Reach Realitas Infinitas about Clinic, partnerships, or general inquiries.
meta.productsDescription: Clinic — patient registration, clinical records, and operational workflows for healthcare teams.
meta.clinicDescription: Clinic helps healthcare professionals register patients, organize patient information, and manage medical histories through a simple and reliable digital workflow.
meta.resetPasswordDescription: Information about Clinic application password recovery links.
meta.realityDescription: Build a strange fictional reality in five quick choices — a playful mini world-building game from Realitas Infinitas.

HomePage.heroSubhead: Realitas Infinitas builds intelligent software systems that bring structure, clarity, and scalability to complex operational environments.
HomePage.heroVisualCaption: Structure, clarity, and depth — the same qualities we engineer into healthcare software.
HomePage.clientsTitle: Engineering trusted on demanding healthcare programs
HomePage.clientsFootnote: We now apply that same rigor to products built for medical practices — beginning with Clinic.
HomePage.brandBody: Realitas Infinitas bridges enterprise-grade engineering with products operators can adopt without friction. From revenue-cycle complexity and integrations to the daily rhythm of clinics, we design systems that respect regulation, workflow reality, and the people behind the screen.
HomePage.productsSectionIntro: Clinic is our product: patient registration, clinical records, and workflows designed to stay dependable under pressure.
HomePage.clinicCardDesc: A healthcare software platform for patient registration, medical record management, and operational workflows. Clinic helps teams organize information, reduce friction, and support better care through clearer digital processes.
HomePage.whyIntro: Engineering discipline and operational realism — without theatrics.
HomePage.why1Desc: Software aligned to real processes: handoffs, exceptions, regulations, and the details that matter on the ground.
HomePage.why2Desc: Interfaces and data models that stay legible as scope grows — so teams are not buried in noise.
HomePage.why3Desc: Foundations that can extend with integrations, volume, and new capabilities over time.
HomePage.why4Desc: Respectful of clinicians, staff, and operators — precise where it counts, calm where it helps.
HomePage.ctaDescription: Explore Clinic or start a conversation about software for your operational environment.

AboutPage.p1: {name} is a product-oriented software company. We focus on building systems that combine <m1>technical precision</m1>, <m2>usability</m2>, and <m3>long-term maintainability</m3> — so the software you rely on today can still make sense years from now.
AboutPage.p2: Our work in healthcare is Clinic today: patient registration, profiles, medical histories, and clinical records—structured information and clear workflows.
AboutPage.p3: We avoid hype and overstated claims. We prefer calm interfaces, explicit data models, and software that earns trust through consistency — built to evolve alongside your organization.

Leadership.title: Leadership
Leadership.intro: Realitas Infinitas is led by professionals with hands-on experience building software for complex operational environments, where technology, business logic, and real-world execution must work together.
Leadership.bioP1: Facundo Alvez is a software engineer with over a decade of experience building healthcare technology solutions for the U.S. market. His work spans software development, product strategy, integrations, automation, revenue cycle workflows, and business-critical systems.
Leadership.bioP2: As founder of Realitas Infinitas, he focuses on creating practical, reliable software for complex operational environments.
Leadership.highlight2: Healthcare technology and revenue cycle experience
Leadership.highlight5: Practical software for complex real-world problems

ContactPage.intro: Send a message using the form below, or email us directly.

ContactForm.name: Name
ContactForm.success: Thanks — your message has been recorded locally. Connect email delivery in ContactForm when ready.

ProductsPage.intro: Today we offer Clinic—focused software for patient registration, clinical records, and operational workflows.
ProductsPage.futureProduct1Desc: Additional product lines are planned as the company grows. Details will be shared when they are ready.
ProductsPage.futureProduct2Desc: A quiet placeholder for what comes next — we prefer shipping over promising.

ClinicPage.heroTitle: Clinic: a clean foundation for patient registration and clinical records.
ClinicPage.feat1Desc: Capture new patients with consistent fields and a clear entry path into your practice.
ClinicPage.feat2Desc: Maintain patient identity and demographic detail in one structured profile.
ClinicPage.feat3Desc: Document history over time so context stays available when it matters.
ClinicPage.feat4Desc: Organize clinical notes and records in a calm, scannable structure.
ClinicPage.feat5Desc: Information is grouped logically — less hunting, fewer inconsistent snapshots.
ClinicPage.feat6Desc: A foundation that can connect to other systems when you are ready to extend.
ClinicPage.workflowSubtitle: A straightforward sequence you can adapt to your practice.
ClinicPage.audienceBody: Clinic is intended for independent healthcare professionals, small clinics, and medical practices that need a more organized way to manage patient information — without adopting an overloaded suite on day one.
ClinicPage.ctaDescription: If you are evaluating tools for your practice or exploring a partnership, we would like to hear from you.

clinicProduct.shortDescription: Patient registration, medical records, and operational workflows for healthcare teams — clarity and reliability by design.

RealityBuilder.title: Reality Builder
RealityBuilder.intro:
Build a reality that should not exist.
Choose the world, the rules, the character, the conflict, and the twist.
There are no correct answers. Only new realities.

rule.heading: Choose a rule of reality
rule.hint: What impossible law shapes daily life?

twist.heading: Choose a twist
twist.hint: What makes this reality stranger still?

ResetPasswordPage.title: Reset password
ResetPasswordPage.intro: Password recovery links belong to the Clinic application at the URL where your instance is deployed (for example your practice’s server), not to this Realitas Infinitas marketing site.
ResetPasswordPage.hint: If you received an email with a link, open it as-is (or copy the full URL). If it does not work, ask your administrator for the correct application URL.
ResetPasswordPage.appUrlLabel: If your team shared a reference URL for the app:
ResetPasswordPage.footerNote: This site is informational; signup and account recovery are handled in the clinical application.
